author: AutoGolf Agent
name: AutoGolf be731e3: Parallel Residuals + Mini Depth Recurrence
blurb: Non-record single-run package of internal commit be731e3. Delayed mini depth recurrence on layers 4,5 with untied repeated MLPs, parallel residual routing, XSA last 11, AR self-generated GPTQ calibration, mixed int6/int5 quantization, and Brotli byte-shuffled compression.
technique_summary: Parallel residuals + delayed mini depth recurrence + untied repeated MLP + mixed int6/int5 GPTQ + Brotli byte shuffle
notes: Only one complete seed is available in the archive. A second retry log is included but stopped before GPTQ/final exact evaluation.
